_comment: Repo → team map for the SLAP codebase. Seeded from the prod repo list in the architecture spec. The team field drives skill-file selection during low-confidence classification: classifier loads the skill files for the candidate teams' repos when LogReg is borderline. Add new repos here without code changes elsewhere — the loader keys off this file.

repos.name: spaghetti
repos.purpose: Primary SLAP mobile app (React Native). Hosts most user-facing screens, navigation, and client-side state.

repos.name: mozzarella
repos.purpose: Secondary RN bundle / shared component library for SLAP. Houses lower-level components, design system, and animations.

repos.name: dropsense
repos.purpose: FTUE (first-time user experience) and Styledrops feature service. Generates Style Drops, handles drop liking and the FTUE journey.

repos.name: slap-feed
repos._note: Not a standalone repo. Lives as a feature branch of Flipkart/edison (last touched 2026-03-26 by Saumya Chauhan). Active feed work happens on sibling slap-feeds/* branches and inside edison's productions tree (style-drop/, social-finds/). Cloned at data/repos/slap-feed/ from edison@slap-feed.
repos.purpose: Feed + card generation work for SLAP. Branched off edison's mainline; includes a feed-adk-poc/ directory plus the standard edison modules.

repos.name: social-finds-pipeline
repos._note: Not a standalone repo. Lives as a feature branch of Flipkart/edison. Cloned at data/repos/social-finds-pipeline/ from edison@social-finds-master-uat. Active Social Finds backend code also lives within edison's productions tree (social-finds/ module).
repos.purpose: Social Finds ingestion + processing. Branched off edison's mainline; includes the social-finds/ module plus uat-track variations.

repos.name: expert-opinion-offline-flow
repos.purpose: Offline ranking / model-quality pipeline for product recommendation. Computes scoring features used by the chat AI ranker.

repos.name: edison
repos.purpose: Core SLAP backend service. Owns chat AI, search, cart, checkout, payment, auth, session management, conversation handling, journey continuation, secrets (Grayskull).

repos.name: edison-gateway
repos.purpose: Gateway / edge service in front of Edison. Handles routing, rate limiting, request shaping. Touches auth headers and session cookies.

repos.name: slap-auto-qc-pipeline
repos.purpose: Automated quality-control pipeline for SLAP response quality. Computes NPS-adjacent metrics, content quality scores, model failure rates.

repos.name: cp-service-clients
repos.purpose: Java client libraries Edison and edison-gateway use to call downstream Flipkart commerce-platform (CP) services.

repos.name: FaceNet
repos.purpose: VTON / virtual try-on model service. Owns face detection, persona matching, virtual-try-on inference.
